title: Per-Agent Memory Plugin Config
description: Configuration schema for the DWG Assistant memory plugin. Place at config/agents/{agentId}/memory-plugin.json

agentId.description: Unique identifier for this agent. Required.

dataDir.description: Base directory for agent data. Default: data/agents/{agentId}/memory/

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model name served by LM Studio

embeddingDimension.description: Embedding vector dimension. Must match the model's actual output dimension.

batchSize.description: Batch size for embedding requests to LM Studio

backupIntervalMs.description: Automatic backup interval in milliseconds. Default: 5 minutes. Set to 0 to disable.

maxBackups.description: Maximum number of automatic backups to retain. Oldest backups are pruned automatically.

indexUpdateIntervalMs.description: Interval in ms between periodic FAISS index rebuilds. The index is also rebuilt immediately after add/forget operations.
